query:
-- Find customers with BOTH a SasBoss Internet service AND a real-provider Internet service
-- These are the duplicates
SELECT 
  sb.customerExternalId,
  sb.externalId AS sasboss_id,
  sb.locationAddress AS sasboss_addr,
  sb.monthlyCost AS sasboss_cost,
  real.externalId AS real_id,
  real.supplierName AS real_supplier,
  real.monthlyCost AS real_cost,
  real.locationAddress AS real_addr
FROM services sb
JOIN services real ON real.customerExternalId = sb.customerExternalId
  AND real.supplierName != 'SasBoss'
  AND real.serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND (
    LOWER(TRIM(real.locationAddress)) = LOWER(TRIM(sb.locationAddress))
    OR real.locationAddress IS NULL OR real.locationAddress = ''
    OR sb.locationAddress IS NULL OR sb.locationAddress = ''
  )
WHERE sb.supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND sb.serviceType = 'Internet'
LIMIT 10;

  AND real.serviceType = 'Internet'
  AND (
    LOWER(TRIM(real.locationAddress)) = LOWER(TRIM(sb.locationAddress))
    OR real.locationAddress IS NULL OR real.locationAddress = ''
    OR sb.locationAddress IS NULL OR sb.locationAddress = ''
  )
WHERE sb.supplierName = 'SasBoss'
  AND sb.serviceType = 'Internet'
LIMIT 10;
